page_title: Attack on Titan Exclusive Art Book
text:
Attack on Titan Exclusive Art Book is an official, digitally released art book for the Attack on Titan manga, including illustrations by the manga's author Hajime Isayama and several other artists. It was published as an exclusive item for the Kodansha Comics and Humble Bundle collaborative release.

Table of contents

Illustrations by Hajime Isayama
Illustrations by Various Artists 
Attack on Titan Anthology: Truth
